title: Automatic Smelt
description: Every block you break that can be smelted will automatically drop its smelted form instead of the raw material.
body:
# Auto Smelt Datapack

> **Automatically smelt ores, sand, clay, logs, and kelp as you mine!**

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hS8BmzrO/images/8df453680240f9efa5cde1e81a7fd3bd8f0634e1.gif)
## Overview

Every block you break that can be smelted will automatically drop its smelted form instead of the raw material.

No special tools needed just install and play!(no config)
**But you can download Automatic smelt tools version where special tools crafted for auto smelt**

---

## What Does It Do?

When you break certain blocks, they drop their **smelted/cooked** versions instead of raw materials:

| Block | Normal Drop | With Auto Smelt |
|-------|-------------|-----------------|
| Iron Ore | Raw Iron | **Iron Ingot** |
| Gold Ore | Raw Gold | **Gold Ingot** |
| Copper Ore | Raw Copper | **Copper Ingot** |
| Ancient Debris | Ancient Debris | **Netherite Scrap** |
| Sand / Red Sand | Sand | **Glass** |
| Clay | Clay Ball (x4) | **Brick (x4)** |
| Kelp | Kelp | **Dried Kelp** |

*Includes all Deepslate ore variants*


Enchantment Compatibility


Skip the furnace entirely for common materials


Carry ingots instead of raw ores (same stack size, more value)

Get usable materials immediately


## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/function autosmelt:disable` | Disable auto-smelting |
| `/datapack enable "file/AutoSmelt_Datapack"` | Re-enable auto-smelting |
| `/reload` | Reload all datapacks |


---
